positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a cozy, magical forest scene at twilight. The composition is centered, featuring a cluster of large, abstract, bioluminescent mushrooms glowing with soft teal and purple light, nestled beneath the delicate silhouettes of gnarled, leafless branches. Include gentle, floating geometric shapes resembling dandelion seeds or stars, rendered in luminous gold ink. The style is clean linework combined with flat, high-contrast graphic design, evoking Art Nouveau meeting modern poster art. The color palette should be dominated by deep indigo blues, emerald greens, and contrasting bursts of warm glow. Perfect for apparel printing, ensuring smooth lines and bold negative space. Composition must be balanced and highly detailed.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, low detail, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealism, gradient skin, depth of field, ugly, asymmetrical
